data.title: CryptoQuant: Undervalued ETH is attracting attention from ETF buyers, and the market may rebound
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: CryptoQuant’s latest report pointed out that the market value to realized value ratio (MVRV) of Ethereum (ETH) relative to Bitcoin (BTC) has dropped to its lowest level since 2019, indicating that ETH may be undervalued. Historical data shows that at similar levels, ETH typically surges and outperforms BTC. Since the end of April, the proportion of ETH/BTC ETF holdings has increased significantly, indicating that institutional investors expect ETH to outperform BTC, possibly driven by the recent Pectra upgrade and the improving macroeconomic environment. On-chain data shows that ETH’s selling pressure has eased and trading volume has increased, supporting its potential uptrend. Currently, the ETH/BTC price ratio has rebounded 38% from its January 2020 low, and investors and traders are betting that ETH has bottomed out, potentially sparking a new round of "altcoin season." (CoinDesk)

data.title: SEC to review executive pay disclosure rules
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) announced that it will hold a roundtable meeting on June 26 to discuss executive compensation disclosure requirements with representatives of listed companies, investors and experts in related fields. The statement said that the requirements for executive compensation disclosure have been expanding, focusing more on changes in the components of compensation rather than the total amount of compensation, and "it is unclear whether the increased complexity provides investors with additional information that is critical to investment and voting decisions." The U.S. SEC said that it is necessary to conduct a retrospective review of executive compensation disclosure rules to ensure that these rules continue to be cost-effective and avoid excessive non-important information while disclosing key information. (Jinshi)

data.title: SEC to Review Executive Compensation Disclosure Rules
data.description: According to Odaily, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has announced a roundtable meeting scheduled for June 26 to discuss executive compensation disclosure requirements. The meeting will include representatives from public companies, investors, and experts in the field. The SEC's statement highlights that the focus of these disclosures has increasingly shifted towards the components of compensation rather than the total amount. It remains unclear whether this added complexity provides investors with crucial information for making investment and voting decisions. The SEC emphasizes the need for a retrospective review of the executive compensation disclosure rules to ensure they remain cost-effective while avoiding the inclusion of excessive non-essential information.

data.title: Bitcoin's May Price Predictions Show Varied Probabilities
data.description: According to Foresight News, data from the Polymarket website indicates varying probabilities for Bitcoin's price increase in May. The market predicts a 37% chance of Bitcoin reaching $110,000, a 14% probability of it climbing to $115,000, and only a 2% likelihood of it hitting $125,000. The current market trading volume has surpassed $13 million.

data.title: Bitget Onchain launches AGT, FARTSIGHT, and buidl tokens
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) has launched Solana and BNB Smart Chain's MEME tokens AGT, FARTSIGHT, and buidl. Users can start trading in the onchain trading section. Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) aims to connect CEX and DEX. Users can use Bitget spot accounts (USDT/USDC) to trade on-chain assets. Currently, it supports public chains such as Solana (SOL), BNB Smart Chain (BSC) and Base.

data.title: Alchemy acquires Solana infrastructure provider DexterLab
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Alchemy announced that it has acquired Solana infrastructure provider DexterLab. This acquisition will enable Alchemy to expand its enterprise-level Solana services and expand infrastructure to accelerate ecosystem innovation. The specific acquisition amount has not been disclosed yet. (The Block)

data.title: ETH, XRP, DOGE fall by about 3% after Moody's downgrades US credit rating
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Moody's downgraded the US sovereign credit rating from Aaa to Aa1, citing widening deficits, rising interest payments and a lack of political will to control spending. Affected by this, the prices of major cryptocurrencies fell, with Ethereum (ETH), XRP and Dogecoin (DOGE) all falling by about 3%. As of now, ETH is trading at $2,494.35, DOGE is trading at $0.2175, and XRP is trading at $2.38.
It is reported that the downgrade triggered risk aversion in the market, causing U.S. Treasury yields to rise, S&P 500 futures to fall, and both traditional and crypto markets were affected. Moody's has also become the third major rating agency to downgrade the United States after Standard & Poor's (2011) and Fitch (2023). (CoinDesk)

data.title: Binance CEO: Currency should not be issued at will, cryptocurrency can solve problems but is still in the early stages
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Richard Teng, CEO of Binance, wrote on the X platform that currencies should not be arbitrarily issued, controlled by a few people, or restricted from cross-border transactions. Cryptocurrency can solve these problems, and we are still in the early stages.
